name: Delivery Workflow Engine & Memory Relay (DWEMR)
description: DWEMR OpenClaw-to-Claude delivery bridge for project initialization and Claude agentic orchestration. A prompt-to-prototype workflow triggered through `/dwemr` commands.

acpAgent.label: ACP agent id
acpAgent.help: Optional ACP agent id override for acp-native runs.

acpBackend.label: ACP backend id
acpBackend.help: Optional ACP backend id override for acp-native runs.

activeProjectPath.label: Active project path
activeProjectPath.help: The currently selected DWEMR project. This is managed automatically by the plugin.

defaultProjectPath.label: Default project path
defaultProjectPath.help: Optional default target project path used by DWEMR when the user does not provide one.

model.label: Claude model
model.help: Optional Claude model or alias for DWEMR runs, for example sonnet, opus, opusplan, or a full model name.

subagentModel.label: Subagent model
subagentModel.help: Optional Claude subagent model override. Use a full model name when possible.

effortLevel.label: Effort level
effortLevel.help: Optional Claude effort override for DWEMR runs: low, medium, high, max, or auto.
